heavyOnlyE2E.rationale: requires contract and anvil setup that stays out of the default live API/runtime lane
requires the browser QA harness and stays out of the default live API/runtime lane
drives the built dashboard in a browser and belongs in the heavy nightly or release gate
validates the browser QA checklist and belongs in the heavy nightly or release gate

desktopHeavyInventory.description: gameOpenWindow — full round-trip with openGameWindow mock (needs canvas mock update)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Needs a fuller desktop canvas harness than the required PR contract suite.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Abnormal window position (off-screen) is corrected to safe defaults (e2e)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Requires a launched desktop window and persisted state across process boundaries.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Microphone input works after permission is granted (hardware)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Requires real device input and OS permission orchestration.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Swabble fires 'wakeWordDetected' event when wake word is spoken (hardware)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Depends on real audio capture and wake-word hardware behavior.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Audio transcription produces non-empty text for clear speech (hardware)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Needs real microphone input and model execution outside the deterministic PR gate.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Camera preview renders in the UI when stream is started (hardware)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Requires camera hardware and a packaged UI surface.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Switching between front/rear camera works (hardware)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Requires multiple camera devices or a device lab.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: takeScreenshot returns a non-empty base64 PNG (hardware)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Depends on live display capture plumbing.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Frame capture mode streams frames at configured interval (hardware)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Requires sustained capture timing verification on a real host.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Deep link received while app is closed causes app to launch (e2e)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Requires packaged-app lifecycle and OS protocol handling.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Deep link received while app is open does not launch second instance (e2e)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Requires multi-process packaged-app behavior.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Shortcuts survive window focus changes (e2e)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Needs a live window manager and global shortcut registration.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: App launches automatically after system restart (e2e)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Needs host restart or VM orchestration.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Auto-launch survives app updates (e2e)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Requires packaged updater flow plus auto-launch registration.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Keyboard shortcut Cmd+Q triggers quit (e2e)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Needs packaged desktop input dispatch.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Keyboard shortcut Cmd+R triggers reload (e2e)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Needs packaged desktop input dispatch.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Keyboard shortcut Cmd+Option+I opens devtools (e2e)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Needs packaged desktop input dispatch.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Gateway discovery sends gatewayDiscovery push event to renderer (integration)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Requires a fuller renderer event channel than the PR contract suite currently provides.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Canvas window is sandboxed — cannot access main app origin (integration)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Needs a launched canvas window and origin isolation checks.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Canvas navigate blocks external URLs (integration)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Requires live canvas window navigation policy checks.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Agent port is reachable via HTTP after status reaches 'running' (integration)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Depends on real subprocess startup and port reachability.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Agent crash triggers automatic restart (integration)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Requires process crash injection and restart orchestration.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Stopping agent while starting does not leave zombie process (integration)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Needs real process lifecycle timing coverage.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Check for updates contacts the release server (network)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Requires live update server interaction.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Applying update relaunches the app (e2e)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Requires a packaged update artifact and relaunched process.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Update check works on both canary and stable channels (network)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Requires live release-channel coverage.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Tray icon persists after main window is closed (e2e)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Verified by packaged test via shell.trayPresent after window close. Converted from manual checklist.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Main window has native vibrancy effect on macOS (e2e)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Verified by packaged test via mainWindow.vibrancyEnabled. Survives resize and window restore.

desktopHeavyInventory.description: Context menu closes when clicking elsewhere (e2e)
desktopHeavyInventory.rationale: Native OS behavior enforced by Electrobun ContextMenu API. Verified implicitly by context menu display tests.

desktopManualChecklist.description: Left-clicking the tray icon opens the companion window (visual)
Right-clicking the tray icon shows the tray context menu (visual)
Window can be dragged by clicking the header region (visual)
Photo quality is acceptable at default settings (hardware)
Requesting accessibility opens System Preferences (OS interaction)
desktopManualChecklist.rationale: Needs human confirmation of OS settings behavior.

desktopManualChecklist.description: Permission status reflects actual system state (OS interaction)
desktopManualChecklist.rationale: Needs human confirmation against OS state.

desktopManualChecklist.description: Context menu appears at cursor position (visual)
Power state reflects actual battery status (hardware)
desktopManualChecklist.rationale: Needs a real battery-backed device and human confirmation.
